goal: Friends coordinate one order or event in-app, with automatic bill splitting.

screens.name: Start a Group Order
screens.purpose: Host picks a vendor and starts a group order/event.

states.empty: Vendor picker + split-type choice (equal / itemized) before creating.

screens.name: Join Screen / Invite
screens.purpose: Share link, shows who's joined so far.

states.success: Avatar row of joined participants, live as people join.
states.error: Order already locked -> 'This order's closed' rather than letting a late joiner add items that won't be counted.

screens.name: Your Picks
screens.purpose: Each participant adds their own items to their personal sub-cart within the group order.

states.success: Personal item list + running personal subtotal; can see other participants' names but not necessarily their items (host can see all).

screens.name: Order Summary (host view)
screens.purpose: Host reviews everyone's picks and locks the order.

states.loading: Waiting on N participants who haven't marked done -> visible checklist, not a silent wait.
states.success: Full itemized list grouped by participant, computed split preview before locking.

screens.name: Payment Split
screens.purpose: Per-participant payment links generated after lock.

states.success: Each participant sees their own amount + Pay button; host sees who's paid.
states.error: A payment fails -> that participant gets a retry, doesn't block others from paying.

userFlow: Host starts a group order for movie-night snacks, picks equal split.
Shares the join link; friends tap in via group_order_join.
Each friend adds their own snacks in participant_cart.
Host watches the summary fill in, locks the order once everyone's marked done.
App computes each person's share and generates individual payment links.
Everyone pays their own share; order proceeds once all are paid (or host can override and cover the rest).
edgeCases: A participant leaves before lock -> their items drop out and the split recalculates automatically.
Order locked with participants still 'not done' -> host gets an explicit warning before locking, not a silent cutoff.
Itemized split where someone adds nothing -> excluded from the split rather than charged an equal share for nothing.
Payment failure -> isolated retry per participant, doesn't block the rest of the group.
notes: Shares its shared-cart primitive with Crew Mode (see 02_crew_mode.json) — same underlying schema shape, just event-scoped (groupOrders) instead of persistent (households). Build the primitive once.
